title: thelypteris microcarpa
intro: Thelypteris microcarpa is a species of fern, which is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta. It is native to tropical Asia, particularly in India, Malaysia, and Thailand. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris microcarpa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and promoting wound healing, and it can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions for consumption.
